headline: Is Public Storage (PSA) Fairly Valued Following Its COO Resignation?
summary: Public Storage (PSA) is back in focus after the company announced that Chief Operating Officer Chris Sambar will resign at the end of July to join T-Mobile as Chief Enterprise Officer. See our latest analysis for Public Storage. At a share price of $320.77, Public Storage has seen short term pressure around the COO resignation and upcoming earnings, but its year to date share price return of 24.12% and 1 year total shareholder return of 15.60% point to momentum that has been building rather...

headline: Public Storage (PSA) Loses COO Chris Sambar As Interim Leadership Takes Over
summary: Public Storage (NYSE:PSA) announced the resignation of Chief Operating Officer Chris Sambar. Sambar is leaving the company to take a senior leadership role at T-Mobile. Public Storage has put interim leadership arrangements in place to cover COO responsibilities. Public Storage operates a large network of self storage facilities. This business tends to track demand tied to housing turnover, small business activity, and personal moves. Leadership changes at the COO level matter because they...
